summary: Iteration 23: Personal Info Photo Upload Feature - All tests passed. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements working correctly. Photo upload, delete, and public profile display all functional.

issues: Google Maps error due to API key domain restriction - known issue from previous iterations, not a code bug

backend_api_tests: PUT /api/providers/my-profile/personal-info - preserves existing photos when updating text fields
GET /api/providers/{provider_id} - photo URLs are accessible via /api/uploads/personal/
POST /api/providers/my-profile/personal-info/photos?category=yard - rejects when 3 photos already uploaded (max limit)
POST /api/providers/my-profile/personal-info/photos?category=pets - rejects when 3 photos already uploaded (max limit)
frontend_ui_tests: Provider Dashboard 'Más Datos' tab loads correctly
Yard photos section displays with 'Fotos del patio (máx. 3)' label
Pets photos section displays with 'Fotos de tus mascotas (máx. 3)' label
Upload button ('Subir') visible when under 3 photos
Photo delete button (X) appears on hover (opacity 0 -> 1)
Both checkboxes visible: 'Tengo patio o jardín' and 'Tengo mascotas propias'
Public provider profile shows 'Más Sobre el Cuidador' section
Public profile displays yard photos under 'Fotos del patio'
Public profile displays pets photos under 'Mascotas del cuidador'
Photos are clickable and open in new tab (cursor: pointer)

seed_data_creation: Test photos uploaded during backend testing (cleaned up). Provider has 2 yard photos and 2 pets photos from previous testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 photo upload feature fully tested: 1) POST /api/providers/my-profile/personal-info/photos?category=yard|pets - uploads compressed photos (max 3 per category), returns photo object with photo_id, url, thumbnail_url. 2) DELETE /api/providers/my-profile/personal-info/photos/{photo_id} - removes photo from DB and filesystem. 3) PUT /api/providers/my-profile/personal-info - preserves existing yard_photos and pets_photos arrays when updating text fields. 4) GET /api/providers/{provider_id} - public profile includes yard_photos and pets_photos in personal_info. 5) Static files served from /api/uploads/personal/. 6) Frontend 'Más Datos' tab shows photo upload sections that appear when checkboxes are checked. 7) Delete button (X) appears on hover with opacity transition. Provider prov_23ad24c36254 currently has 2 yard photos and 2 pets photos.

photo_upload_api.POST yard photo: PASS - Uploads, compresses, creates thumbnail, returns photo record

photo_delete_api.DELETE photo: PASS - Removes from DB and filesystem

photo_persistence.PUT text preserves photos: PASS - Photo arrays preserved when updating text fields

public_profile.yard_photos: PASS - Visible in 'Más Sobre el Cuidador' section

frontend_ui.Más Datos tab: PASS - Shows photo upload areas for yard and pets
frontend_ui.upload button: PASS - 'Subir' button visible when under 3 photos

known_issues.google_maps: RefererNotAllowedMapError - API key needs domain authorization (not a code bug, external configuration)
